name: bde-score
description: AI governance-aware multi-factor stock scoring MCP server. 7-factor composite scoring (VIX, Volume Profile, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, OBV, ATR) with real-time Yahoo Finance data. Designed for agents that need to evaluate stock momentum with institutional-grade risk awareness.

tools.name: score_stock
tools.description: Score a single stock using 7-factor composite model (VIX, Volume Profile, RSI, MACD, Bollinger, OBV, ATR)

tools.name: batch_score
tools.description: Score multiple stocks in one call with ranked results

tools.name: top_performers
tools.description: Get top N performing stocks from a watchlist, sorted by composite score

tools.name: worst_performers
tools.description: Get worst N performing stocks from a watchlist, sorted by composite score

tools.name: market_overview
tools.description: Get overall market sentiment including VIX level and breadth indicators
